items.title: React
items.description: One of, if not the, most popular frontend libraries. I enjoy it for quick prototypes and larger projects alike, often paired with tools from its rich ecosystem.

items.title: Vue
items.description: One of the major frontend frameworks. I've used it continuously since the Vue 2 days across all kinds of projects, so it's very close to my heart and I always enjoy coming back to it.

items.title: Astro
items.description: Frontend framework focused on static site generation. For me, Astro is hands-down the best SSG framework out there, and I use it across various private projects; even this site is powered by Astro!

items.title: Tailwind
items.description: A modern utility-first CSS framework. Always my first choice for building clean, responsive UIs, often alongside a component library.

items.title: Vite
items.description: The gold-standard frontend build tool and dev server. I use it in every frontend project without exception and I'm sure you do too!

items.title: PWA
items.description: Progressive Web Apps are web apps that install and run offline like native apps. I really like the concept and have shipped them wherever it made sense.
